args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation vulnerability affecting auth-api and session-store. Patched versions: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: The patch window for CVE-2026-30117 remediation has been confirmed. Deploying patched versions: auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9. All staff sessions will require re-establishment following patching.

args.text: Both services patched and verified: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9. CVE-2026-30117 remediation deployed successfully.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete. Both affected services have been successfully deployed with patches:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Verification confirms both services are running the patched versions.

args.text: Credential rotation completed per rotation-checklist.md: (1) invalidated all active refresh tokens, (2) rotated signing keys, (3) confirmed old keys are rejected. Session remediation for CVE-2026-30117 complete.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: Following security maintenance tonight to address CVE-2026-30117, all staff sessions have been invalidated. Please sign in again to re-establish your session. This ensures all active credentials are refreshed.
